title: Frontend Development Roadmap
description: Complete learning path from zero to senior frontend developer covering HTML CSS JavaScript React and advanced topics.

stages.milestone: Build 2 static websites and deploy to GitHub Pages
Build a fullstack React app with real API integration
Lead a frontend feature end to end with tests and CI/CD

title: Backend Development Roadmap
description: Step by step path to becoming a backend developer using Python or Node.js covering APIs databases and deployment.

stages.milestone: Build a CRUD REST API with a real database
Deploy a production API with auth and database on cloud
Design and deploy a microservices architecture at scale

title: DevOps Engineering Roadmap
description: From developer to DevOps engineer covering Linux Docker Kubernetes CI/CD and cloud infrastructure.

stages.milestone: Containerize an application and run it with Docker Compose
Deploy app to Kubernetes on AWS with full CI/CD pipeline
Build internal developer platform with golden path deployments

title: AI and Machine Learning Roadmap
description: Structured path from Python basics to production ML engineering covering classical ML deep learning and LLMs.

stages.milestone: Build and evaluate a classification model on a real dataset
Fine-tune a transformer model and deploy as an API
Build and ship a production RAG system or LLM-powered product

title: Tech Communication and Leadership Roadmap
description: Path from developer to technical leader covering communication writing presentation and management skills.

stages.milestone: Write clear README docs and give first team presentation
Lead a sprint facilitate retrospectives and present to leadership
Manage a team of 5+ engineers and own a product area
